notes: Based on 7 live whole-unit condominium/apartment rental listings for Casa Green Bukit Jalil collected from Malaysia property portals on 2026-06-27. Room-only/bedspace/partition listings were excluded. The sample spans 825–1,003 sqft and includes current portal pages from EdgeProp, Mudah, Roomz Malaysia, and DurianProperty/BuddyHartanah. One EdgeProp room-rental listing at RM700 was explicitly excluded.
